✦ Traditional Jewelry ✦

Worn forCenturies

From Kundan bangles to pearl jhumkas, from layered gold malas to oxidized silver — our jewelry collection spans the full breadth of South Asian goldsmithing tradition. Each piece is sourced directly from karigars across the subcontinent and available at our Columbus studio.

For the Most Sacred Day

✦ South Indian · Temple Jewelry
The Temple Bride
Full temple jewelry set — layered necklaces, maang tikka, jhumkas, and bangles in 22K gold-finish.
✦ Mughal · Polki & Ruby
The Mughal Bride
Polki nath, maang tikka, ruby jhumkas, and layered necklace with custom dupatta chains. Bespoke orders welcome.
